summary: CRM Global Clean Home - Comprehensive E2E testing completed. CRITICAL FIX APPLIED: FastAPI route ordering bug fixed - moved /leads/recent, /leads/export, /leads/bulk BEFORE /leads/{lead_id}. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend pages load correctly with proper navigation.

issues: Shows 'null (25%)' label - should show actual source name or 'Unknown'

action_items: Fix 'null' label in traffic sources pie chart on dashboard - show 'Unknown' or actual source name
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL FIX APPLIED: Route ordering in server.py - /leads/recent, /leads/export, /leads/bulk now defined BEFORE /leads/{lead_id} to prevent 'recent' being matched as lead_id
ESLint warnings in useEffect hooks (missing dependencies) - minor, not affecting functionality
seed_data_creation: Created test lead, quotes, tasks, interactions via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Route ordering fix verified working. All CRUD operations tested. Google OAuth login cannot be automated - use session cookie bypass for authenticated tests. Test user session token: test_session_1773347040801

backend: GET /api/leads/recent - 401 without auth, 200 with auth (ROUTE ORDERING FIXED)
GET /api/leads/export - 401 without auth, CSV response with auth (ROUTE ORDERING FIXED)
frontend: Login page renders with Google OAuth button (data-testid='google-login-button')
Dashboard loads with KPI cards, charts, recent leads
Leads list with filters, search, export CSV, bulk actions
Lead detail page with contact info, quotes, interactions
New lead form (/leads/new) with all required fields
Kanban board with 6 status columns, drag-drop cards
Tasks page with filter buttons (En attente, Complétées, Toutes)
Analytics page with visitor stats, funnel, traffic sources
Activity/Journal page with detailed action logs
Sidebar navigation works for all routes

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Route ordering bug causing /api/leads/recent and /api/leads/export to return 404/422
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: In FastAPI, route matching is order-dependent. The dynamic route /leads/{lead_id} was defined BEFORE static routes /leads/recent and /leads/export. This caused 'recent' and 'export' to be matched as lead_id values.
reproduction_steps: 3. Database query fails to find lead with id='recent'
4. Returns 404 Lead not found or 422 validation error
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Reordered routes in server.py: GET /leads -> GET /leads/recent -> GET /leads/export -> POST /leads/bulk -> GET /leads/{lead_id} -> PATCH /leads/{lead_id}
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All route ordering tests pass - /leads/recent returns 401 (requires auth), /leads/export returns 401 (requires auth), not 404 or 422
